input.task: Materialize deterministic DAG task tree for lesson editor media blocks
scope: Media blocks must render inline in lesson_document_v1 document order
Media insertion must use document index 0 after the 2026-04-23 post-DAG UX amendment instead of active-position insertion or unconditional append
Media block movement must be deterministic and preserve document identity
Editor, persisted preview, and learner UI must not expose internal media identifiers or raw metadata
lesson_document_v1 and backend APIs must remain unchanged unless a future contract task explicitly amends them
No Markdown, Quill, or legacy media-token pathways may be reintroduced

task_tree.description: Lock media identity authority before implementation: lesson_document_v1 media blocks use lesson_media_id and media_type; media_asset_id remains asset/placement metadata outside editor document truth.
retrieval_queries: lesson_document_v1 media block lesson_media_id media_asset_id contract
LessonMediaBlock media_type lessonMediaId serialization
media_pipeline_contract media_asset_id lesson_media_id identity boundary
course_lesson_editor_contract lesson media document references
task_tree.verification_requirement: Active contracts still require lesson_media_id as editor document media identity and no implementation output stores media_asset_id in lesson_document_v1.

task_tree.description: Add deterministic document-model operations for explicit media insertion and block movement before editor UI controls depend on them.
retrieval_queries: LessonDocument insertBlock insertMedia blocks unmodifiable move operation
lesson_document_model_test insert media ordered blocks
LessonMediaBlock validation mediaTypesByLessonMediaId
task_tree.verification_requirement: Unit tests prove explicit media insertion and block movement preserve canonical lesson_document_v1 serialization and mutate only document order.

task_tree.description: Replace Course Editor append-only media insertion with insertion at the active document cursor or selection position.
retrieval_queries: _insertMediaBlockIntoDocument insertMedia blocks.length
LessonDocumentEditor selected block selection insertion index
_insertImageIntoLesson _insertVideoIntoLesson _insertAudioIntoLesson _insertDocumentIntoLesson
lesson media pipeline inline document tokens without trailing fallback
task_tree.verification_requirement: Widget tests prove media insertion uses active document position, not unconditional append, and preview receives the same block order.

task_tree.description: Add deterministic editor controls for moving non-text media blocks within the continuous writing surface.
retrieval_queries: LessonDocumentEditor LessonMediaBlock focus selected block controls
moveBlockUp moveBlockDown LessonDocumentEditor test
continuous writing surface media block controls
task_tree.verification_requirement: Widget tests prove media block move controls update document order deterministically, respect boundaries, and do not expose internal ids or types.

task_tree.description: Remove user-facing internal media identifiers and raw media type/debug labels from editor, persisted preview, and learner UI.
retrieval_queries: Media: block.mediaType block.lessonMediaId LessonDocumentEditor
LessonDocumentPreviewMedia label mediaAssetId
_lessonMediaLabel mediaAssetId lesson_page
debug labels lesson_document_v1 Markdown Quill rendered UI
task_tree.verification_requirement: Widget tests and deterministic string audits prove editor, persisted preview, and learner UI do not expose lesson_media_id, media_asset_id, raw media_type, or debug/model labels.

task_tree.description: Add deterministic regression gates for media insertion order, media block movement, renderer parity, and metadata no-leak behavior.
retrieval_queries: lesson_document_fixture_corpus media blocks image audio video document
lesson_media_pipeline_test inline document tokens trailing fallback
lesson_editor_authority_audit forbidden rendered labels
LER-011 deterministic audit gates media metadata leak
task_tree.verification_requirement: Regression gates fail on forbidden metadata leakage or append-only insertion and pass on positioned media insertion, movement, and inline renderer parity.

task_tree.description: Run final aggregate verification for the media-block implementation slice and record completion evidence.
retrieval_queries: lesson editor media blocks final gate
lesson_document_v1 media insertion movement no metadata leak
Markdown Quill legacy media token forbidden editor authority
preview learner media inline document order
task_tree.verification_requirement: Final gate proves media blocks insert and move in document order, render inline in preview and learner views, leak no internal metadata, and do not alter lesson_document_v1 or backend APIs.
